evals.expected_output: Full review fixing all ui-ux rules

assertions.trap: Purple-to-blue gradient, cyan accents on dark bg
assertions.description: No cyan-on-dark, purple-to-blue gradients, neon accents
No Inter/Roboto/Arial — distinctive fonts (Geist, Outfit, Satoshi)

assertions.trap: bg-clip-text bg-gradient on h1 and metric
assertions.description: No gradient text on headings/metrics
No pure black — off-black (zinc-950)
No pure white (#fff) — tinted off-white
Tint shadows, never pure black rgba
min-h-[100dvh] not h-screen
No bounce easing — ease-out-quart/expo
button for actions, never div onClick
Never outline-none without :focus-visible replacement

assertions.trap: CSS .card:hover { box-shadow: ...; transition: box-shadow 0.3s; } — animates box-shadow directly
assertions.description: Pseudo-element opacity for shadow, not direct animation

assertions.trap: 'Save Settings', 'Export Data', 'Create Report' — but 3 identical primary CTAs
assertions.description: Verb + noun labels, never generic Submit/Continue
Icon buttons must have aria-label
tabular-nums on number displays
Headings: text-wrap: balance
Never nest cards — flatten with spacing

assertions.trap: Red solid Delete Account as primary CTA
assertions.description: Destructive: secondary style + confirmation, not primary
Never block zoom
Never block paste

assertions.trap: mb-4 on list children instead of gap on parent
assertions.description: gap for spacing, not margins
Errors: what + why + how to fix
Only animate transform/opacity
No 3-column equal card grids — asymmetric layout

assertions.trap: Big number + small label + gradient = template
assertions.description: No hero metric template (big number + label + gradient)
No filler: Elevate, Seamless, Unleash, Next-Gen
Control hierarchy with weight+color, not massive scale alone
Left-align + asymmetric — don't center everything
No generic John Doe / example.com placeholders
2-3 text colors only: dark, grey, light grey
2 font weights for UI: normal (400/500) + bold (600/700)

assertions.trap: Three bg-blue-600 buttons on same page
assertions.description: 1 primary action per page
Drop labels if format is obvious
Consistent border-radius — pick one system
45-75 chars/line — max-width: 20-35em on prose
Semantic z-index scale (100-600), not arbitrary 9999

assertions.trap: Modal for enabling dark mode toggle
assertions.description: No modals for simple actions — inline/sheet/drawer

assertions.trap: Every item wrapped in border rounded shadow
assertions.description: Not everything needs a card container
Images must have width/height (prevents CLS)
No grey text on colored background — use same-hue shade

assertions.trap: Input with placeholder only, no associated label
assertions.description: Form inputs need associated labels for a11y
:focus-visible over :focus
Empty state: what, why, how to start, visual, help
font-display: swap on @font-face
px or rem only, never em for type
Active voice: 'Install the CLI' not 'will be installed'
No console.log, no TODO in production code
Dramatic weight pairing: 700+400, not 600+500
CSS logical properties for RTL support
Touch targets >= 44px
antialiased font smoothing on body
